text.title: Daily Marketing Standup Checklist Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when daily-marketing-standup-checklist is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.note: Fix: Set a 15-minute timer; cut items once timer fires.

antipattern.description: Slack standup messages vanish into history.

antipattern.reason: No anomaly threshold; numbers seem unchanged.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply ±30% rule; even 'nothing happened' is a data point worth signing.
